@graph.name: TOXFREE® LSZH RZ1MZ1-K
@graph.description: LSZH armoured cable with galvanized steel wire armour (ATEX). ACCORDING TO: IEC 60502-1. TOXFREE® LSZH RZ1MZ1-K is a LSZH armoured cable. In the event of fire, it does not emit toxic gases, nor does it give off corrosive gases, avoiding any possible damage to people or electronic equipment. Recommended for industrial installations requiring severe mechanical protection, long-distance runs, and areas with fire and explosion risks (ATEX).
@graph.category: Hardware > Building Materials > Wiring & Cables > Electrical Cables

audience.audienceType: Electrical Distributors, Electrical Installers, Engineers (Industrial Projects)

subjectOf.name: Technical Datasheet - TOXFREE® LSZH RZ1MZ1-K

additionalProperty.name: Conductor
additionalProperty.value: Electrolytic annealed copper, class 5 (flexible) according to EN 60228 and IEC 60228

additionalProperty.name: Insulation
additionalProperty.value: Cross-linked polyethylene type XLPE according to IEC 60502-1

additionalProperty.name: Separation Sheath / Bedding
additionalProperty.value: Low smoke halogen free polyolefin

additionalProperty.name: Armour
additionalProperty.value: Galvanized steel wire (multiconductor) or aluminium wire (single-conductor, to prevent parasitic currents)

additionalProperty.name: Outer Sheath
additionalProperty.value: Low smoke halogen free polyolefin. Black colour

additionalProperty.name: Flame Non-Propagation
additionalProperty.value: Flame non-propagation according to EN 60332-1 / IEC 60332-1

additionalProperty.name: CPR Classification
additionalProperty.value: Cca-s1b, d1, a2 according to EN 50575

additionalProperty.name: Halogen Free
additionalProperty.value: Halogen free according to EN 60754-1 / IEC 60754-1

additionalProperty.name: Low Corrosive Gases Emission
additionalProperty.value: Low corrosive gases emission according to EN 60754-2 / IEC 60754-2

additionalProperty.name: Low Smoke Emission
additionalProperty.value: Low smoke emission according to UNE-EN 61034 / IEC 61034

additionalProperty.name: Minimum Bending Radius
additionalProperty.value: 10x cable diameter

additionalProperty.name: Impact Resistance
additionalProperty.value: AG4 High severity

additionalProperty.name: Rodent Proof
additionalProperty.value: Rodent proof

additionalProperty.name: Chemical & Oil Resistance
additionalProperty.value: Good

additionalProperty.name: UV Resistance
additionalProperty.value: UV Resistant according to EN 50618

additionalProperty.name: Hydrocarbon Resistance
additionalProperty.value: Hydrocarbon resistant

additionalProperty.name: Water Resistance
additionalProperty.value: AD5 Jets

additionalProperty.name: ATEX
additionalProperty.value: Suitable for ATEX explosive atmospheres according to ITC-BT 29

additionalProperty.name: Installation Conditions
additionalProperty.value: Open Air. Buried. In conduit.

additionalProperty.name: Standards and Approvals
additionalProperty.value: AENOR, RoHS, CE

additionalProperty.name: Typical Applications
additionalProperty.value: Industrial facilities, ATEX zones, Power distribution
